title: MCP Security, Prompt Injection, and Supply Chain Trust · Skill Brief: Ssrf Exfiltration
summary: Threat-model an MCP server consuming untrusted content and exposing write tools. Planned artifact: Add and verify the agent ext ssrf exfiltration increment in an MCP security test suite and operating policy. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Restrict outbound destinations, redirects, local addresses, and sensitive response data.
Bind actions to user intent, authorization, audience, and protected resource.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
